title: CreateDPCompat
description:
Compatibility mod between Create-Fabric and Datapack Portals.
Enables trains to go through custom portals to whatever dimension.
body:
# CreateDPcompat
A Fabric mod aimed to provide a way for Create : https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric Trains to pass through DatapackPortals : https://modrinth.com/mod/datapackportals

Doing so enables train to move to any dimension provided the user or modpack maker provides necessary datapack configuration

Exemple Below :

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1k95061B/images/7c5573cc7de5c8be38e04e89f4c214a2e2041c50.gif)

Compatible with Steam 'n' Rails : https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails version : 1.5.0
